scope.target: Immutable candidate validation, independent verification, and remediation closeout
constraints: Do not publish, tag, or merge without separate authorization
Keep release publication in a separate workflow

steps: Validate immutable candidate package parity and real upgrade
Run source and extracted-package required gates
Close the remediation workflow and hand off publication
validation: Workflow, assessment, version, package, shell, and commit validators
execution.last_completed_step: Validated the governed candidate, two immutable builds, source and extracted target gates, and independent assessment ASM-20260718-001.
execution.next_action: Hand the validated candidate to the separately authorized v0.4.1 release-publication workflow.

results.summary: Candidate commit 962919b passed 21/21 source checks, 19/19 synchronized target checks, focused package validation, two byte-identical builds, and independent assessment ASM-20260718-001. PKG-001 and PKG-002 are resolved in v0.4.1; publication remains a separate workflow.
tests_run: two immutable candidate builds (byte-identical ZIP, tar.gz, and sidecars)
results.residual_risk: v0.4.0 direct upgrade remains intentionally deferred to PKG-003/v0.5.0; v0.0.1 requires manual reconciliation to validated v0.3.0 provenance first.
